criticalNoteForQasem: Phase 35.4 investigation complete. ROOT CAUSE: 7 URLs were never crawled by Google despite being technically perfect. 3 parent calculators are already indexed but stale. The 'Request Indexing' rejections are because Google cannot accept indexing requests for pages it hasn't crawled. Fix requires GSC UI 'Test Live URL' button via CloakBrowser (not available via API). All pages verified: HTTP 200, correct canonicals, index,follow, substantial content. No code changes needed.
